ast.name: content
ast.source:
Translate {} into Chinese:
    1. Preserve the meaning and tone
    2. Maintain appropriate cultural context
    3. Keep formatting and structure
    Return only the translated text.
ast.target:
将 {} 翻译成中文：
    1. 保留含义和语气
    2. 保持适当的文化语境
    3. 保持格式和结构
    仅返回翻译后的文本。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Create a bullet-point summary of {}. Each bullet point should capture a key point. Return only the bullet-point summary.
ast.target: 为 {} 创建一个要点摘要。每个要点应捕捉一个关键点。仅返回要点摘要。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Simplify {} to a 6th-grade reading level (ages 11-12). Use simple sentences, common words, and clear explanations. Maintain the original key concepts. Return only the simplified text.
ast.target: 将 {} 简化到六年级阅读水平（11-12岁）。使用简单句子、常用词汇和清晰解释。保留原始关键概念。仅返回简化后的文本。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
Explain {} in simple terms that a 5-year-old would understand:
    1. Use basic vocabulary
    2. Include simple analogies
    3. Break down complex concepts
    Return only the simplified explanation.
ast.target:
用五岁孩子能理解的简单术语解释 {}：
    1. 使用基础词汇
    2. 包含简单类比
    3. 分解复杂概念
    仅返回简化后的解释。

ast.name: content
ast.source:
Expand {} to twice its length by:
    1. Adding relevant details and examples
    2. Elaborating on key points
    3. Maintaining the original tone and style
    Return only the expanded text.
ast.target:
将 {} 扩展到两倍长度，方法如下：
    1. 添加相关细节和示例
    2. 详细阐述关键点
    3. 保持原始语气和风格
    仅返回扩展后的文本。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Generate a hierarchical table of contents for {}. Use appropriate heading levels (H1, H2, H3, etc.). Include page numbers if present. Return only the table of contents.
ast.target: 为 {} 生成一个分层目录。使用适当的标题级别（H1, H2, H3等）。如果存在页码则包含。仅返回目录。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Create a glossary of important terms, concepts, and phrases from {}. Format each entry as "Term: Definition". Sort entries alphabetically. Return only the glossary.
ast.target: 为 {} 创建一个包含重要术语、概念和短语的词汇表。每个条目格式为“术语：定义”。按字母顺序排序条目。仅返回词汇表。

ast.name: content
ast.source: Include the active note's content as context
ast.target: 将活动笔记的内容作为上下文包含

ast.name: content
ast.source: Manage your projects with different contexts and configurations.
ast.target: 使用不同的上下文和配置管理您的项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the file tree as a nested structure of folders and files
ast.target: 获取文件树作为文件夹和文件的嵌套结构

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a single note in search v3 sized chunks. Use only when you already know the exact note path and need its contents.
ast.target: 以搜索v3大小的块读取单个笔记。仅当您已知确切笔记路径并需要其内容时使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the current daily note via Obsidian CLI and return the note content as plain text.
ast.target: 通过Obsidian CLI读取当前每日笔记，并以纯文本形式返回笔记内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a random note via Obsidian CLI and return the note content as plain text.
ast.target: 通过Obsidian CLI读取随机笔记，并以纯文本形式返回笔记内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or read today's daily note, or get its vault path, via the official Obsidian CLI. Use readNote for reading specific notes by path. Use obsidianRandomRead for picking a random note.
ast.target: 通过官方Obsidian CLI创建或读取今日每日笔记，或获取其库路径。使用readNote通过路径读取特定笔记。使用obsidianRandomRead随机选择笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read frontmatter properties from your vault via the official Obsidian CLI: list all property names used vault-wide, or read specific property values from a note.
ast.target: 通过官方Obsidian CLI从您的库中读取frontmatter属性：列出库中使用的所有属性名称，或从笔记中读取特定属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: List tasks across your vault via the official Obsidian CLI with filters for completion status, file, daily note, and more.
ast.target: 通过官方Obsidian CLI列出库中的任务，并可按完成状态、文件、每日笔记等进行筛选。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Query the vault link graph via the official Obsidian CLI: list backlinks to a file, outgoing links from a file, orphaned notes with no incoming links, or unresolved wikilinks.
ast.target: 通过官方Obsidian CLI查询库链接图：列出指向文件的反向链接、来自文件的传出链接、没有传入链接的孤立笔记或未解析的wikilinks。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for notes using lexical/keyword-based search
ast.target: 使用基于词汇/关键词的搜索查找笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for notes in the vault based on query, salient terms, and optional time range
ast.target: 根据查询、显著术语和可选时间范围在库中搜索笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Index the vault to the Copilot index

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the INTERNET (NOT vault notes) when user explicitly asks for web/online information
ast.target: 当用户明确要求网络/在线信息时，搜索互联网（非库笔记）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the list of tags in the vault with occurrence statistics.
ast.target: 获取库中标签的列表及出现统计。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 获取本地时区或指定UTC偏移量的当前时间。返回纪元时间、ISO字符串和格式化字符串。

ast.source: Convert natural language time expressions to date ranges for use with localSearch

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert a Unix timestamp (in seconds or milliseconds) to detailed time information
ast.target: 将Unix时间戳（秒或毫秒）转换为详细的时间信息

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert a specific time from one timezone to another using UTC offsets
ast.target: 使用UTC偏移量将特定时间从一个时区转换到另一个时区

ast.target: 当用户提供YouTube网址时，获取YouTube视频的字幕

ast.name: description
ast.source: Get the current time in any timezone
ast.target: 获取任何时区的当前时间

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert epoch timestamp to human-readable format
ast.target: 将纪元时间戳转换为人类可读格式

ast.name: description
ast.source: Convert time expressions to date ranges
ast.target: 将时间表达式转换为日期范围

ast.name: description
ast.target: 在不同时区间转换时间

ast.name: description

ast.target: 使用其自身的行分块逻辑，按顺序块读取特定笔记。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 在您的库中创建或重写文件

ast.source: Make a targeted, single-match edit to an existing file
ast.target: 对现有文件进行有针对性的单次匹配编辑

ast.name: description
ast.source: List vault tags with occurrence statistics
ast.target: 列出库标签及出现统计

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create or read today's daily note, or get its path
ast.target: 创建或读取今日每日笔记，或获取其路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read a random note using the official Obsidian CLI
ast.target: 使用官方Obsidian CLI读取随机笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read frontmatter properties from notes or list all property names in the vault
ast.target: 从笔记中读取前置属性或列出所有属性名称

ast.name: description
ast.source: List tasks across the vault with filters for status, file, and daily note
ast.target: 列出整个库中的任务，支持按状态、文件和每日笔记筛选

ast.name: description
ast.source: Query the vault link graph: backlinks, outgoing links, orphans, unresolved
ast.target: 查询库的链接图谱：反向链接、出站链接、孤立页面、未解析链接

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leave it blank, unless you are using a proxy.
ast.target: 留空，除非您正在使用代理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defaults to us-east-1 when left blank. With inference profiles (global., us., eu., apac.), region is auto-managed.
ast.target: 留空时默认为 us-east-1。使用推理配置文件（global.、us.、eu.、apac.）时，区域将自动管理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Briefly describe the purpose and goals of the project
ast.target: 简要描述项目的目的和目标

ast.name: description
ast.source: Custom instructions for how the AI should behave in this project context
ast.target: 自定义指令，说明AI在此项目上下文中应如何行为

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define patterns to include specific files, folders or tags (specified in the note property) in the project context.
ast.target: 定义模式以将特定文件、文件夹或标签（在笔记属性中指定）包含在项目上下文中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Folder where custom prompts are stored
ast.target: 存储自定义提示的文件夹

ast.name: description
ast.source: Process variables like {activenote}, {foldername}, or {#tag} in prompts. Disable for raw prompts.
ast.target: 处理提示中的变量，如 {activenote}、{foldername} 或 {#tag}。禁用以使用原始提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort order for slash command menu prompts
ast.target: 斜杠命令菜单提示的排序顺序

ast.name: description
ast.source: Debug mode will log some debug message to the console.
ast.target: 调试模式会将一些调试信息记录到控制台。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the selected model to your models list. After adding, check the Model Tab.
ast.target: 将选定的模型添加到您的模型列表。添加后，请检查模型选项卡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add the currently selected model to model List.
ast.target: 将当前选定的模型添加到模型列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose where to open the plugin

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically add the active note or Web Viewer tab (Desktop only) to chat context when sending messages.
ast.target: 发送消息时，自动将活动笔记或网页查看器标签页（仅限桌面版）添加到聊天上下文中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically add selected text from notes or Web Viewer (Desktop only) to chat context. Disable to use manual command instead.
ast.target: 自动将笔记或网页查看器（仅限桌面版）中选定的文本添加到聊天上下文。禁用以改用手动命令。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show suggested prompts in the chat view
ast.target: 在聊天视图中显示建议的提示

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show relevant notes in the chat view
ast.target: 在聊天视图中显示相关笔记

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically saves the chat after every user message and AI response.
ast.target: 在每条用户消息和AI响应后自动保存聊天记录。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, uses an AI model to generate a concise title for saved chat notes. When disabled, uses the first 10 words of the first user message.
ast.target: 启用时，使用AI模型为保存的聊天笔记生成简洁标题。禁用时，使用第一条用户消息的前10个词。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default folder name where chat conversations will be saved. Default is 'copilot/copilot-conversations'
ast.target: 保存聊天对话的默认文件夹名称。默认为 'copilot/copilot-conversations'

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default tag to be used when saving a conversation. Default is 'ai-conversations'
ast.target: 保存对话时使用的默认标签。默认为 'ai-conversations'

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort order for the chat history list
ast.target: 聊天历史列表的排序顺序

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sort order for the project list

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable direct vault operations via the Obsidian desktop CLI
ast.target: 通过Obsidian桌面版CLI启用直接的库操作

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of reasoning iterations the autonomous agent can perform. Higher values allow for more complex reasoning but may take longer.
ast.target: 自主代理可执行的最大推理迭代次数。更高的值允许更复杂的推理，但可能需要更长时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable autonomous agent mode in Plus chat. The AI will reason step-by-step and decide which tools to use automatically, improving response quality for complex queries.
ast.target: 在Plus聊天中启用自主代理模式。AI将逐步推理并自动决定使用哪些工具，从而提高复杂查询的响应质量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, Copilot references your recent conversation history to provide more contextually relevant responses. All history data is stored locally in your vault.
ast.target: 启用后，Copilot会参考您最近的对话历史记录，以提供更具上下文相关性的响应。所有历史数据都本地存储在您的库中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use Miyo as your local search, PDF parsing, and context hub. Copilot will send the current vault folder name to Miyo and can request scans, but folder registration is managed in Miyo.
ast.target: 使用Miyo作为您的本地搜索、PDF解析和上下文中心。Copilot会将当前库文件夹名称发送给Miyo，并可以请求扫描，但文件夹注册在Miyo中管理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, Miyo searches all indexed content across all folders. When disabled, searches are limited to the current vault folder only.
ast.target: 启用后，Miyo会搜索所有文件夹中所有已索引的内容。禁用后，搜索仅限于当前库文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which service to use for self-host web search.
ast.target: 选择用于自托管网络搜索的服务。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter OpenAI Organization ID if applicable

ast.name: description
ast.source: This is your actual model, no need to pass a model name separately.
ast.target: 这是您的实际模型，无需单独传递模型名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The number of previous conversation turns to include in the context. Default is 15 turns, i.e. 30 messages.
ast.target: 要包含在上下文中的先前对话轮数。默认为15轮，即30条消息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically summarize context when it exceeds this token count. Set to maximum to make it less aggressive.
ast.target: 当上下文超过此令牌数时自动进行摘要。设置为最大值以降低其激进程度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, AI responses will include footnote-style citations within the text and numbered sources at the end. This is an experimental feature and may not work as expected for all models.
ast.target: 启用后，AI响应将在文本中包含脚注式引用，并在末尾列出编号的来源。这是一项实验性功能，可能无法在所有模型上按预期工作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Copilot goes through your vault to find relevant notes and passes the top N to the LLM. Default for N is 30. Increase if you want more notes included in the answer generation step.
ast.target: Copilot会遍历您的库以查找相关笔记，并将排名前N的笔记传递给LLM。N的默认值为30。如果您希望在答案生成步骤中包含更多笔记，请增加此值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number of partitions for Copilot index. Default is 1. Increase if you have issues indexing large vaults. Warning: Changes require clearing and rebuilding the index!
ast.target: Copilot索引的分区数。默认为1。如果索引大型库时遇到问题，请增加此值。警告：更改需要清除并重建索引！

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable folder and graph-based relevance boosts for lexical search results. When disabled, provides pure keyword-based relevance scoring without folder or connection-based adjustments.
ast.target: 为词法搜索结果启用基于文件夹和图谱的相关性提升。禁用时，提供纯基于关键词的相关性评分，不进行基于文件夹或连接的调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When enabled, Copilot index won't be loaded on mobile devices to save resources. Only chat mode will be available. Any existing index from desktop sync will be preserved. Uncheck to enable QA modes on mobile.
ast.target: 启用后，Copilot索引不会在移动设备上加载以节省资源。仅聊天模式可用。来自桌面同步的任何现有索引将被保留。取消选中以在移动设备上启用问答模式。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to parse tool call arguments as JSON
ast.target: 无法将工具调用参数解析为JSON

ast.name: error
ast.source: No chat model available, skipping save
ast.target: 没有可用的聊天模型，跳过保存

ast.name: error
ast.source: Web tab not found or closed
ast.target: 网页标签页未找到或已关闭

ast.name: error
ast.source: Web tab content not loaded yet
ast.target: 网页标签页内容尚未加载

ast.name: error
ast.source: Provider does not support model listing
ast.target: 提供商不支持模型列表

ast.name: error
ast.source: Provider is required to build a curl command.

ast.name: label
ast.source: Tool descriptions (native tool calling via bindTools)
ast.target: 工具描述（通过bindTools进行原生工具调用）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Response truncated due to token limit
ast.target: 由于 token 限制，响应被截断

ast.name: message
ast.source: Response truncated due to max_tokens limit
ast.target: 由于 max_tokens 限制，响应被截断

ast.name: message
ast.source: Response truncated due to MAX_TOKENS limit
ast.target: 由于 MAX_TOKENS 限制，响应被截断

ast.name: message
ast.source: Provide the note path relative to the vault root without a leading slash.
ast.target: 请提供相对于保险库根目录的笔记路径，且不要以斜杠开头。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Tool executed but returned no result
ast.target: 工具已执行但未返回结果

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid input: User message must be a string
ast.target: 输入无效：用户消息必须是字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: No YouTube URLs found in the user prompt. URLs must be in the user prompt instead of the context notes.
ast.target: 在用户提示中未找到 YouTube URL。URL 必须位于用户提示中，而不是上下文笔记中。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Transcript not available. Only English videos with auto transcript enabled are supported
ast.target: 字幕不可用。仅支持启用了自动字幕的英文视频

ast.name: message
ast.source: An error occurred while transcribing the YouTube video
ast.target: 转录 YouTube 视频时发生错误

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Your AI assistant for Obsidian • @ to add context • / for custom prompts
ast.target: 您的 Obsidian AI 助手 • @ 添加上下文 • / 使用自定义提示词

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 输入 AWS 区域（例如 us-east-1）

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 输入 URL 并按 Enter...

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter OpenAI Organization ID if applicable
ast.target: 如适用，请输入 OpenAI 组织 ID

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter Azure OpenAI API Instance Name
ast.target: 输入 Azure OpenAI API 实例名称

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter Azure OpenAI API Embedding Deployment Name
ast.target: 输入 Azure OpenAI API 嵌入部署名称

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter Azure OpenAI API Deployment Name
ast.target: 输入 Azure OpenAI API 部署名称

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 输入 Azure OpenAI API 版本

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 输入扩展名（例如 txt, excalidraw.md）

ast.name: subtitle
ast.target: 引用您保险库中的笔记

ast.name: subtitle
ast.target: 引用打开的浏览器标签页

ast.name: title
ast.target: 像解释给5岁孩子一样解释

ast.name: title
ast.target: 自定义提示词文件夹名称

ast.name: title
ast.target: 自定义提示词排序策略

ast.name: title
ast.target: 自动将活动内容添加到上下文

ast.name: title
ast.target: 自动将选中内容添加到上下文

ast.name: title
ast.source: Generate AI Chat Title on Save
ast.target: 保存时生成 AI 聊天标题

ast.name: title
ast.target: 将转换后的 Markdown 存储在

ast.name: title
ast.target: 在 Miyo 中搜索所有内容

ast.name: title
ast.target: 启用文件夹和图谱提升

ast.name: title
ast.source: Enable Obsidian Sync for Copilot index
ast.target: 为 Copilot 索引启用 Obsidian 同步

ast.name: title
ast.target: 在移动端禁用索引加载
